since_last: 63% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.20%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.32% · BTC +3.52% · Gold -0.26% · Nasdaq100 +0.59%. 63% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.20%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.20%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.65%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.10%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.10%, DELL +5.25%, AMD +4.48%, MU +4.33%, VRT +4.19%. Laggards: SPCX -7.44%, AVAV -6.97%, MDB -4.98%, GOOGL -3.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.44% at $171.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
